author: darlal
description: Enhanced Quick Switcher, search open panels, and symbols.

manifest.author: darlal
manifest.description: Enhanced Quick Switcher, search open panels, and symbols.
manifest.name: Quick Switcher++

name: Quick Switcher++

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

- **Outgoing Links Relation**: Outgoing links in frontmatter are now included in Symbol and RelatedItems modes in addition to links found in the note body #240 
- **Bookmark title ordering:** when a bookmark has an explicit title set, that title will be preferred above the underlying filename.
- [Internal] upgrade dependencies, workflow actions, and add artifact provenance attestations.
- [Internal] Integrate Obsidian linter and address current findings.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

- **Deep linking Bookmarks**: When in Bookmarks mode, navigating to bookmarks that deep link to headings/blocks now navigate directly to the target location position instead of just opening the target file. Thanks @wuqui!
- Enabled support for restore previous input when in Standard mode #234
- Enable showing tags for file suggestions in Standard mode #225

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

- Minor bug fix for Standard mode showing null when restore previous input is enabled #234

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: ## What's New ### Heading hierarchy breadcrumbs #137 In Headings and Symbol modes, configurable settings allow for displaying breadcrumbs of nested headings up to the current heading suggestion. Configuration: ### Tag display in suggestion results #225 Configurable settings allow for displaying note tag information in Headings, Editor, and Bookmarks suggestions. Tags can be sourced from inline tags, frontmatter, or both. Configuration: ### Bug fixes - Remove vertical spacing for live preview rendered content when possible #233

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

- "Live Preview" rendering can be enabled for Links, Tags, and Callouts #151
- Symbol mode now displays tags from frontmatter #187 
- Address issue with restore previous input #202
- Reorganized the settings panel for clarity

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: ## What's New **Base Views** Symbol Mode now supports navigating directly to a specific .base file view. Using the Symbol mode trigger on a .base file suggestion will display the available Views configured for that .base file, allowing you to navigate directly to a specific View #221 **Frontmatter as title source** The [Preferred suggestion title source](https://github.com/darlal/obsidian-switcher-plus?tab=readme-ov-file#general-settings) setting now has a new option which allows you to set a Frontmatter property key as the source for suggestion titles. Nested Frontmatter paths can be specified via dot notation #223 **Note:** This setting is supported in custom modes only.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

- Fix for Restore previous input setting swallowing user input. When restore previous input was enabled, the first user input character would get overridden, this is now fix #183

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: ## What's New **Compatibility update for Obsidian 1.9.10** Fix for Override default Switcher launch button on mobile #217 **Switcher++ button on "New tab" page** The default "New tab" or "Empty tab" page includes an additional button to launch Switcher++ directly into a configurable mode #203

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: ## What's New **Show file extension indicator** The file extension is now displayed as an optional indicator in the switcher when enabled #210 **Workspace Mode updates** New hotkey allows you to save the current workspace before switching to a different one #189 **Command Mode updates** - **Setting to specify max number of recent items**: new slider setting for command mode that allows you to specify how many recently used commands to show #207 - **Change sort order for recent items:** setting for changing the order of the recently used commands #207

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: ## What's New **Open multiple suggestions without closing the Switcher** New hotkey that allows you to open multiple suggestions in the background, while keeping the Switcher++ window open #181

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: ## What's New **Hotkey to launch Obsidian global search** New hotkey to transfer the search text from Switcher++ to the builtin Obsidian global search UI to perform a vault-wide fulltext search #166 **Opening Bookmarks respect new tab preferences** Apply the `Default to open in new pane` setting when opening file-based bookmarks #182 **Override Standard mode rendering behavior** Introduce a new `Override Standard mode rendering` setting to control overriding rendering behavior in Standard mode. This can be used to enable/disable the multi-line rendering #176

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: ## What's New - Command added to `Open in default app` directly from the switcher in custom modes (Headings, Editor, Bookmarks, Symbol, RelatedItems). When triggered, the file for the highlighted suggestion will be launched in the associated default system app #148

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

- Fix for deferred views to enable navigation, as well as, generating Symbol and RelatedItems suggestion for them.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

- Minor update to expose UI to toggle the [Enable quick open hotkeys for top results](https://github.com/darlal/obsidian-switcher-plus?tab=readme-ov-file#general-settings) setting #179

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

- **Obsidian 1.7.2 compatibility** #177 
Obsidian release 1.7.2 (Insider release at time of writing) introduced some new APIs and removed others. This update migrates from the `fuzzySearch` and `prepareQuery` APIs to `prepareFuzzySearch` and `prepareSimpleSearch`. Thanks for the heads up @liamcain!

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: ## What's New - Fix an issue where Bookmark mode would display files that had been deleted #174 If you bookmarked a file, then deleted the file without first deleting the bookmark, Bookmark mode would incorrectly display a bookmark for the deleted file. With this update, a bookmark will no longer be displayed when the underlying file has been deleted. - Hotkeys for quick selection of top nth suggestion in the switcher #124

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: ## What's New **Display Headings as Live Preview** When in `Headings` and `Symbol` modes, search results for Heading can be rendered similar to Obsidian's "Live Preview" mode #151. This is experimental and disabled by default, the setting `Display Headings as Live Preview` must be enabled in the plugin [General Settings](https://github.com/darlal/obsidian-switcher-plus?tab=readme-ov-file#general-settings). With the feature turned off: With the feature enabled: Note that when the feature is enabled heading text that matches the search query will not be highlighted in the live preview result. The new "toggle preview (selected heading)" shortcut has been added to allow you to toggle between the live preview and raw text mode for the selected result. **Other updates** - Minor documentation updates. - Reduce build output size by stripping comments and applying compression.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

- Fix Vault suggestion rendering when using Windows paths #160 

**Command Mode updates**
- **set hotkey:** For the selected suggestion, you can navigate to the Obsidian Hotkeys settings dialog to enable assigning a hotkey to the command #141 
- **toggle pinned:** toggle the "Pinned" state of a command from directly from Switcher++
![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/e8db4b39-0fff-4e99-bdda-85a75760b099)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

- Add setting to [Display mode trigger instructions](https://github.com/darlal/obsidian-switcher-plus?tab=readme-ov-file#general-settings), which displays the mode trigger keys in the bottom prompt instructions section of the switcher #70 #155 
![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/a5407bb3-a453-4eb6-94f0-8e72147e7101)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

**Minor fixes for Obsidian 1.6.1**
- Fix to make overriding the "⊕" button (in the Navigation Bar) on mobile platforms work again
- Fix to make custom prompt instruction visible

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

- Update the remove invalid link characters when using the "insert into editor" command #154 
- Restrict new file button visibility on mobile to modes that support file creation

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

- New setting to allowing launching Switcher++ by using the "⊕" button in the Navigation Bar on mobile platforms. This overrides the built-in, default behavior of the button #143 
- Updated `Standard Mode` ribbon icon to match default system Switcher icon #149

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

**Quick Filters for Headings Mode**
Added a several [Quick Filters](https://github.com/darlal/obsidian-switcher-plus/tree/4.0.0?tab=readme-ov-file#quick-filters) to `Headings Mode` to quickly narrow down the types of items that appear in your search results. These can limit the result set to matches for:
- `recent files`: items that were recently closed
- `bookmarks`: bookmark items
- `filenames`: filenames
- `headings`: headings
- `external files`: filename matches for files that do not have `.md` or `.canvas` file extensions #142 
![image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/19dfd2b2-0f3c-4809-9a63-18b4b0ab5763)


## Notes
- With this release, the core "Command Palette" plugin has be enabled for `Command Mode` to function properly. The core Command Palette is where the [Pinned commands](https://help.obsidian.md/Plugins/Command+palette#Pinned+commands) functionality is managed.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

**Open vaults directly from the switcher**
- New trigger to display the list of existing vaults in the switcher #26  
- Filter, select the desired vault, and press enter to open. Default trigger is `vault ` (with a trailing space)
- Note: this feature is experimental and works on Desktop only for now

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: ## What's New **Result Priority Adjustments** - New category for "Attachment file types" priority settings is available #121 - Results for "Unresolved filenames" (files that do not exist yet) is now visible via the settings UI by default #119 - Individual file types (by extension) priorities can be added via the data.json settings file Settings dialog screenshot:

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

- Workspace mode will now allow you to create a new workspace when there are no results #94 
- Initial Workspace list should be sorted when there's no search term #134

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

- Added command trigger escape character #106 
- Fix `Command` mode hotkey rendering sometimes reporting errors

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

**Insert link into the active editor**
- Symbol suggestion that represent links to blocks such as `[[filename#^blockID]]` can be inserted into the active editor #127 
- Symbol suggestions that represent external (markdown) links such as `[displaytext](url)` can also be inserted into the active editor.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

**Show the first H₁ heading as "title"**
- `Preferred suggestion title source` [setting](https://github.com/darlal/obsidian-switcher-plus#general-settings) enables the first H₁ heading in a file to be displayed instead of the filename in all applicable modes (except `Standard Mode`) #73 

**Bookmarks in Headings Mode**
- `Search Bookmarks` [setting](https://github.com/darlal/obsidian-switcher-plus#search-headings-configuration) in `Headings Mode` enables bookmarks to be included in searches for that mode.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

- Externalized the switcher up/down navigation keys to the plugin settings file so users can modify them more easily #120 #69

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New
**Insert link in active editor**
- A feature that enables you to insert a markdown link into the active markdown editor pointing to the selected file suggestion in the switcher. When a suggestion is selected in the switcher and there is an active markdown editor, use the shortcut key (default `cmd/ctrl+i` to insert a link in the active editor to the suggestion.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New
- Setting to allow the switcher to be closed with the backspace key #113 
- Number of recent files displayed by default in Headings mode increased to 25, with new setting to customize #116 
- Default editor list ordered by access time with setting to switch back to previous behavior #114

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New
- Mode triggers for the active editor only #71  #109 
  - `Symbol` and `RelatedItems` modes each now support an additional trigger character that will always trigger the mode for the active editor only. The original mode trigger for active suggestion or active editor (as fallback) is unchanged.
  - Both new triggers are accessible via Global Commands

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New
- Bookmarks: added Quick Filters to Bookmarks mode for quickly changing the expected result type
- Remove empty hotkey list during global command registration

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New
- Minor version change to make the 3.2.0 Switcher++ release eligible for the Obsidian 1.2.7 public release version.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

### Bookmarks
Added support for the new Bookmarks plugin.

- Moved plugin settings from Starred to Bookmarks
- Global command renamed to reflect the new Bookmarks functionality
- Removed the Starred plugin support entirely

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description: ## What's New ### Quick Filters A new feature that enables you to quickly narrow down the kinds of results returned for a query using per-defined filter hotkeys. This new feature is currently enabled for `Symbol Mode` and `Related Items Mode`, see the docs for [Quick Filters](https://github.com/darlal/obsidian-switcher-plus#quick-filters)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

- Hot fix for Obsidian v1.2.3: bookmarks have been added to the switcher with Obsidian v1.2.3 which caused some unexpected behavior in Switcher++ under certain conditions. With this release Switcher++ should be working as expected with Obsidian v1.2.3.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

- **Canvas support**: You can quickly navigate to cards on a Canvas using `Symbol Mode`. For Canvas files, Quick Switcher++ will display titles for all the cards on the Canvas enabling you to quickly jump to any card. This includes Text cards, File cards, link cards, and Groups.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

- `Command mode` should respect the pinned command ordering on initial display
- New settings to [restore previous input](https://github.com/darlal/obsidian-switcher-plus#general-settings) when a mode is triggered via global hotkey, thanks @bytemain!
- `Headings mode` allows [overriding](https://github.com/darlal/obsidian-switcher-plus#search-headings-configuration) the "Show attachments" and the "Show all file types" settings so the specified file types are always searched #92

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

- New [Result priority adjustments](https://github.com/darlal/obsidian-switcher-plus#general-settings) setting that enables you to prioritize some [result types](https://github.com/darlal/obsidian-switcher-plus/blob/master/src/settings/generalSettingsTabSection.ts#L6) by adjusting their match scores such that they appear higher/lower in the result list.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

-  Maintenance release, upgrade dependencies
-  Documentation updates
-  Add descriptive name to Standard mode global command #93

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

- New setting to enable accessing the different modes of the switcher from a ribbon icon button. You can define which modes are displayed in the ribbon, useful for interacting with the switcher on mobile devices.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

- [Related Items mode](https://github.com/darlal/obsidian-switcher-plus#related-items) show the total count for outgoing links
- Setting to disable showing the additional indicators #86 
- Setting for toggling the display of path information for files at the root of the vault #75

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

- [RelatedItems](https://github.com/darlal/obsidian-switcher-plus#related-items) mode includes showing outgoing links from the selected source file #87

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

- Feature updates to [Command mode](https://github.com/darlal/obsidian-switcher-plus#run-commands)
  - Display recently used commands when there is no search text #76 
  - Display indicator icons for commands that are pinned in the system Command Palette, and recently used commands
  - Sort initial display into two sections, pinned commands, and recently used when there is no search text

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

- Reference views (like backlinks, outline, etc..) should now show the pane title instead of the filename in `Editor` mode and editor suggestions
- Update documentation to clarify (hopefully) the differences for `Symbol` / `Related Items` mode global command vs trigger character #36 #61 #71 #83
- Custom Tab navigation shortcuts (`cmd+o`, `cmd+\`) should work in `Standard` mode (even though they're not listed in the prompt instructions yet) #60

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

- Support for custom behaviors in `standard mode` - a highly requested feature #51 #62 #77. Can be disabled in via the [Override Standard mode behavior](https://github.com/darlal/obsidian-switcher-plus#general-settings) general setting.
  - Custom path formatting
  - Display filename and path on separate line
  - Default to open in new pane support
  - Custom rendering, indicator icons, etc.. 
- Cosmetic display fixes

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

- Show button to create new file when there are no results in `Headings mode`. Closes issue #67 
- Enable `shift+enter` to create new file in `Headings mode`

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

- Add support for showing backlinks in `Related Items mode` see the [Related Items documentation](https://github.com/darlal/obsidian-switcher-plus#related-items). Closes issue #43 
- Show status icons in suggestion everywhere they are applicable

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

- **Obsidian v1.0.0 compatibility:**
- Add hotkey to open tab to the right, and below
- Add icons for each global command (useful for when showing in the command bar)
- Other refactoring and fixes

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

- **Obsidian v0.16.2 compatibility:** Fix a number of issues due to this major Obsidian release.

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

- New feature: a list of open editors are now displayed alongside the recent file list when `headings` mode is triggered without any search text. Selecting these editor suggestions will navigate to the existing open editor instead of opening a new one. #41

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

- Add support for showing obsidian callouts in `symbol mode` #57 

**Note:** Requires Obsidian version `0.15.9`

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

- Fix issue where `shift-enter` to create a new file after returning to standard mode was not working #64 
- Fix issue where empty panels would cause errors #66

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

- Fix issue where popout windows would not focus properly when navigated to via `editor` mode #65
- Upgrade dependencies

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

- Break up filename/path rendering for all non-standard modes #51

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

- Core Obsidian `0.15.5` compatibility to accommodate Obsidian suggestion layout changes
- Support for opening files in a the new popout window #60

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

- Core Obsidian `0.15.4` compatibility to accommodate Obsidian suggestion layout changes
- New `Parent folder path (filename optional)` file path rendering option #59

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

- Core Obsidian `0.15.3` compatibility
- Fix rendering issues due Obsidian 0.15.3 layout changes

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

**New features**
- General setting option to control how file path information is displayed for suggestions see [Preferred file path display format](https://github.com/darlal/obsidian-switcher-plus#general-settings)
- Show file path information for `Editor` and `Starred` suggestions #59

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

**New features**
- Add vim-like navigation with ctrl-j/k to navigate next/previous #50 
- Option to always Include filename suggestions when in `Heading mode` [docs](https://github.com/darlal/obsidian-switcher-plus#search-headings-configuration) #56
- Respect Obsidian's excluded files list. Obsidian excluded files suggestions can either he hidden entirely or shown but downranked [docs](https://github.com/darlal/obsidian-switcher-plus#search-headings-configuration)
- Some minor bug fixes

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

**New features**
- Ability to have QS++ open files in a new editor pane by default [docs](https://github.com/darlal/obsidian-switcher-plus#general-settings) #29 
- Option to exclude files that are already open from the related items list [docs](https://github.com/darlal/obsidian-switcher-plus#related-items-configuration) #25 

**Feature updates** 
- `Headings Mode` when there are no matches against the first H1 (the "title" header), fallback to searching against the filename #45

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

- New feature: run Obsidian command right from QS++, [see the docs](https://github.com/darlal/obsidian-switcher-plus#run-commands) thanks @dgurkaynak 
- New feature: navigate to ["Related Items"](https://github.com/darlal/obsidian-switcher-plus#related-items) of a selected file. Currently, related items are other files in the same folder as the selected file

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

- Added support for [Obsidian Hover Editor](https://github.com/nothingislost/obsidian-hover-editor) in the modes where reasonable #40 
- Added CSS to enable styling of `headings` mode icons #37 
- Enabled open in new pane when `Mod` is down to match the current Obsidian new pane paradigm #35

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

- New mode to filter/navigate to your starred files (starred searches, not yet, unfortunately) see the [docs](https://github.com/darlal/obsidian-switcher-plus#navigate-starred-notes)
- Fix for #32

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

* Folder exclusion in Heading mode
  * New Headings mode setting to allow exclusion of folders, [see doc](https://github.com/darlal/obsidian-switcher-plus#search-headings-configuration)
* Improve settings panel organization
* Refined link filtering in Symbol Mode
  * New settings to allow finer grained control over which link types are displayed in Symbol mode, [see docs](https://github.com/darlal/obsidian-switcher-plus#symbol-navigation-configuration)
* Minor fixes and improvements

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

* **Obsidian 0.12.19** compatibility
* Maintenance and dependencies upgrade
* Minor fixes and improvements

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New

* **Auto-select nearest heading:** The symbol list can be configured to automatically select the nearest preceding heading when unfiltered.
* **Customize symbols list:** New  settings have been added to allow you to customize which symbol types appear in symbol mode
* Minor fixes and improvements

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New
* Search by headings (Headings mode):  Find your notes by searching through headings instead of filenames. See the [docs and configuration](https://github.com/darlal/obsidian-switcher-plus#search-headings-instead-of-filename)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New
* **Mobile support:** Switcher++ should now work properly on mobile devices
* **New setting:** `Open Symbols in active pane on mobile devices` to control whether or not editor splits should be created when navigating on mobile devices

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New
* Workspaces mode: you can switch between your configured workspaces right from Switcher++. See the [docs and configuration](https://github.com/darlal/obsidian-switcher-plus/tree/1.0.0#switch-workspaces)

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
# Official Obsidian (0.12.9) API Compatibility

## What's New
* Compatible with: **Obsidian 0.12.9**
* New Feature: Side panel views! You can now configure Switcher++ to show editors/views from the side panels.  When selected this will expand the side panel (if needed) and focus the editor/view. The `Include side panel views` setting can be used to configure which view types from the side panels should show up in the switcher.
* Settings panel has been reorganized into grouped sections to increase ease of use
* Settings from the builtin switcher are automatically applied to switcher++ so you don't have to configure them twice

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's New
* Compatible with: **Obsidian 0.12.5**
* Plugin now exposes two new settings to enable users to customize the trigger characters for each mode.

releases.author: darlal
releases.description:
# Official Obsidian (0.12.4) API Compatibility

## What's New
* Compatible with: **Obsidian 0.12.4**
* Added new setting "Show existing only", mirrors builtin switcher setting.
* Fixed issue with switcher not showing any suggestions (#12)

releases.author: darlal
releases.description:
# Official Obsidian (0.10.7) API Compatibility

## What's New
* Compatible with: **Obsidian 0.10.7**
* Improved handling for symbol highlighting on navigation (#9)

releases.author: darlal
releases.description:
# Official Obsidian (0.10.6) API Compatibility

## What's New
* Compatible with: **Obsidian 0.10.6**
* Keyboard navigation enhancements
* Setting to enable displaying symbols in line order, and indented (similar to Outline view)
* Styles exposed for theming
* Migrated to Typescipt

releases.author: darlal
releases.description:
# Official Obsidian (0.9.20) API Compatibility

## What's New
* Compatible with: **Obsidian 0.9.20**

releases.author: darlal
releases.description:
# Official Obsidian (0.9.17) API Compatibility

## What's New
* Compatible with: **Obsidian 0.9.17**
* Added new settings tab to allow for user configuration

releases.author: darlal
releases.description:
# Official Obsidian (0.9.10) API Compatibility

## What's New
* Compatible with: **Obsidian 0.9.10**
* Updated to use the official Obsidian beta API instead of the unofficial volcano loader

releases.author: darlal
releases.description:
## What's New
* Compatible with: **Obsidian 0.9.6**
* Show heading symbols first when suggestion list is not filtered
* Enable navigating to symbols from reference views (Backlinks, Outline, etc..)
* Sort suggestions by match score
releases.name: v0.0.5-alpha Obsidian 0.9.6

releases.author: darlal
releases.description:
## What's New
* Compatible with: **Obsidian 0.8.14**
* Added ctrl-p/ctrl-n to navigate up/down the list. Thanks @liamcain 
* Symbol navigation now works in preview mode as well
* Display more distinctive names for reference panes (Outline, Backlinks, etc..)
releases.name: v0.0.4-alpha Obsidian 0.8.14

releases.author: darlal
releases.description:
## What's New
* Compatible with: **Obsidian 0.8.8**
releases.name: v0.0.3-alpha Obsidian 0.8.8

releases.author: darlal
releases.description:
## What's New
* Compatible with: **Obsidian 0.8.5**
* New setting: `focusEditorOnSymbolNavigation`, set to true to focus the editor for keyboard input after symbol navigation
releases.name: v0.0.2-alpha Obsidian 0.8.5

releases.author: darlal
releases.description:
Initial experimental version.

Compatible with: **Obsidian 0.8.4**
releases.name: v0.0.1-alpha Obsidian 0.8.4
